## Merge Checklist

- [ ] Exactly one requirement item is covered by this PR
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where needed
- [ ] Required CI checks are green
- [ ] Docs were updated
- [ ] Rollback path is complete and realistic
- [ ] Release impact is understood
